metadata.name: quality-evaluation-rule-library
metadata.description: Rules are stored as JSON Spec so Python, Java and OM adapters can share the same rule source without depending on a database table.
metadata.business_goal: Support six-dimension data quality evaluation, rule recommendation, parameter setting and task execution.
metadata.source: Data Asset Management Operation Platform Whitepaper

field_metadata.rule_id: Stable rule identifier used by API, frontend and Java backend.
field_metadata.dimension: One of normativity, completeness, accuracy, consistency, timeliness, accessibility.
field_metadata.applicability: Target object, data type, column patterns and required context.
field_metadata.parameters: Business-adjustable parameters. Frontend should render these as friendly form fields.
field_metadata.threshold: Pass condition and allowed failure rate.
field_metadata.scripts: SQL, GE and ETL landing templates. Business users should not edit these directly.
field_metadata.issue_strategy: Issue routing and remediation strategy after rule failure.

normativity.description: Whether data complies with standards, naming, encoding, format and value-domain rules.

completeness.description: Whether required fields, records and relationships are complete.

accuracy.description: Whether values, numeric precision, length and business logic are correct.

consistency.description: Whether the same business object is consistent across fields, tables, systems and lineage.

timeliness.description: Whether data freshness, update delay and publish timeliness meet expectations.

accessibility.description: Whether data can be accessed safely, reliably and within response-time requirements.

rules.name: table_accessible
rules.core_definition: 校验数据表可被正常查询访问。

SQL.expression: SELECT 1 FROM {{ table_name }} LIMIT 1
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 检查数据库连接、网络、服务状态和元数据路径配置。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: access_permission_valid
rules.core_definition: 校验授权用户或角色具备对应数据访问权限，无权限缺失或越权。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM information_schema.schema_privileges WHERE grantee='{{ grantee }}' AND table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND privilege_type='{{ privilege_type }}'
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_valid_result(query="SELECT * FROM information_schema.schema_privileges WHERE grantee='{{ grantee }}' AND table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND privilege_type='{{ privilege_type }}'")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 补齐授权、调整权限粒度，敏感数据需同步脱敏和审计策略。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: query_response_time
rules.core_definition: 校验常规查询响应时间不超过预设阈值，默认核心数据≤1000毫秒。

SQL.expression: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {{ table_name }}
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 优化索引、分区、缓存或资源配置，必要时拆分查询场景。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: api_status_available
rules.core_definition: 校验数据服务API返回成功状态码且响应时间不超过预设阈值。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM {{ api_monitor_table }} WHERE api_name = '{{ api_name }}' AND (status_code < 200 OR status_code >= 300 OR response_ms > {{ max_response_ms }})
SQL.description: 基于API监控日志返回不可用或超时记录。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT * FROM {{ api_monitor_table }} WHERE api_name = '{{ api_name }}' AND (status_code < 200 OR status_code >= 300 OR response_ms > {{ max_response_ms }})")

ETL.description: API巡检或DataOps任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 检查API网关、鉴权、网络和后端服务状态，恢复后重新执行可用性校验。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: data_service_availability_sla
rules.core_definition: 校验数据服务在统计窗口内可用率达到SLA阈值。

SQL.expression: SELECT service_name, AVG(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS availability_rate FROM {{ service_monitor_table }} WHERE service_name='{{ service_name }}' AND monitor_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ window_hours }} HOUR) GROUP BY service_name HAVING availability_rate < {{ min_availability_rate }}
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT service_name, AVG(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS availability_rate FROM {{ service_monitor_table }} WHERE service_name='{{ service_name }}' AND monitor_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ window_hours }} HOUR) GROUP BY service_name HAVING availability_rate < {{ min_availability_rate }}")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 检查服务实例、网关和依赖组件，恢复后复核SLA达标情况。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: least_privilege_permission
rules.core_definition: 校验授权角色不存在超出白名单的敏感权限。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM {{ permission_table }} WHERE object_name='{{ table_name }}' AND privilege_type NOT IN ({{ allowed_privileges }})
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT * FROM {{ permission_table }} WHERE object_name='{{ table_name }}' AND privilege_type NOT IN ({{ allowed_privileges }})")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 收回越权权限，按岗位和数据分级重新授权并留存审批记录。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: sensitive_field_masking_available
rules.display_name: 敏感字段脱敏可访问校验
rules.core_definition: 校验敏感字段对普通访问角色仅开放脱敏结果，不直接暴露明文。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM {{ access_audit_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND column_name='{{ sensitive_column }}' AND role_name='{{ role_name }}' AND masking_enabled <> 'Y'
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT * FROM {{ access_audit_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND column_name='{{ sensitive_column }}' AND role_name='{{ role_name }}' AND masking_enabled <> 'Y'")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 立即启用脱敏策略或收回访问权限，敏感访问需补充审批和审计。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: catalog_searchable
rules.core_definition: 校验数据表已发布到数据目录并可被授权用户检索。

SQL.expression: SELECT '{{ table_name }}' AS table_name WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM {{ catalog_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND searchable='Y')
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT '{{ table_name }}' AS table_name WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM {{ catalog_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND searchable='Y')")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 补充目录发布信息、标签和授权范围，刷新检索索引。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: metadata_description_understandable
rules.display_name: 元数据说明可理解性校验
rules.core_definition: 校验表和字段具备业务说明，便于用户理解和正确使用数据。

SQL.expression: SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (column_comment IS NULL OR TRIM(column_comment)='' OR CHAR_LENGTH(column_comment) < {{ min_comment_length }})
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT column_name FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (column_comment IS NULL OR TRIM(column_comment)='' OR CHAR_LENGTH(column_comment) < {{ min_comment_length }})")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 补齐字段中文名、业务含义、统计口径和使用说明。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: data_owner_reachable
rules.display_name: 数据责任人可联系校验
rules.core_definition: 校验数据资产登记了有效责任人和联系方式，支持问题流转和申请授权。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM {{ asset_owner_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (owner_name IS NULL OR owner_contact IS NULL OR owner_status <> 'ACTIVE')
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT * FROM {{ asset_owner_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (owner_name IS NULL OR owner_contact IS NULL OR owner_status <> 'ACTIVE')")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 补齐数据责任人、运维责任人和联系方式，离职或转岗责任人需及时变更。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: query_success_rate
rules.core_definition: 校验数据查询在统计窗口内成功率达到阈值。

SQL.expression: SELECT object_name, AVG(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_rate FROM {{ query_log_table }} WHERE object_name='{{ table_name }}' AND query_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ window_hours }} HOUR) GROUP BY object_name HAVING success_rate < {{ min_success_rate }}
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT object_name, AVG(CASE WHEN status='SUCCESS' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS success_rate FROM {{ query_log_table }} WHERE object_name='{{ table_name }}' AND query_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ window_hours }} HOUR) GROUP BY object_name HAVING success_rate < {{ min_success_rate }}")

rules.remediation_suggestion: 分析查询失败原因，修复权限、资源、SQL兼容性或服务稳定性问题。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: index_statistics_available
rules.display_name: 索引统计信息可用校验
rules.core_definition: 校验大表存在可用索引或统计信息，以保障访问性能。

SQL.expression: SELECT '{{ table_name }}' AS table_name WHERE {{ table_row_count }} >= {{ large_table_threshold }} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM {{ index_metadata_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND status='VALID')
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT '{{ table_name }}' AS table_name WHERE {{ table_row_count }} >= {{ large_table_threshold }} AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM {{ index_metadata_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND status='VALID')")

ETL.description: ETL任务可翻译的规则动作。

rules.remediation_suggestion: 为高频过滤字段补充索引或刷新统计信息，必要时优化分区策略。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。

rules.name: backup_restore_available
rules.core_definition: 校验关键数据表具备最近成功备份且恢复演练状态有效。

SQL.expression: SELECT * FROM {{ backup_status_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (last_backup_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ max_backup_hours }} HOUR) OR restore_test_status <> 'SUCCESS')
SQL.description: 返回不符合规则的数据行或可执行检查语句。

GE.expression: ge_df.expect_query_to_return_no_rows(query="SELECT * FROM {{ backup_status_table }} WHERE table_name='{{ table_name }}' AND (last_backup_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL {{ max_backup_hours }} HOUR) OR restore_test_status <> 'SUCCESS')")

rules.remediation_suggestion: 补跑备份任务并完成恢复演练，关键表需纳入容灾巡检。
rules.issue_strategy: 不符合规则的数据进入问题库，并生成整改工单。
